productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Wind Sky Blue Jacket
description: CompositionCollared jacket with zippered hood in fresh splash blue, made of 100% cotton, has a mesh lining, elastane cuff and hem, branded zipper on the front, zippered pocket on right chest and adidas patent 3-Stripes running down the sleevesFittingRegularWash Careonly hand wash gentlyDo not machine washWash with like coloursWash and iron inside outDo not use fabric softenerUse mild detergent onlyDo not iron on motif/print/trims/logoWith this Climalite enabled jacket, you can conveniently ignore the heat and keep your focus right where it needs to be: on the finish line. A combination of carefully selected fabrics, this jacket keeps your body dry by drawing sweat away from your body helping you to perform at your peak in even the most heated competition. Pull out the hood form the zippered collar when it pours or when its windiny, and convert it into a stylish wear when the sky is all bright and sunny. Wear it with an undertone crew or round neck tee and denims with sneakers for the maximum stylish look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-26"
